component.name: convffpg
component.summary: Imported MP4 editor with bundled FFmpeg export

description.p: convffpg is a Tauri desktop editor that imports MP4 clips into persisted sessions and uses a bundled FFmpeg toolchain to export edited MP4 and GIF outputs.
The current build focuses on an OpenScreen-style imported-video workflow with timeline trim, speed, magnify, and text regions, plus recent-session reopening and project persistence.
Fixes the Flatpak startup sandbox error by removing the packaged dev URL, keeps Tauri dev mode working, and publishes the Linux binary directly instead of wrapping it in a tarball.
